enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua-conversion.title: Enable Automatic Tagging for PDF/UA Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to a PDF/UA‑compliant tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf's automatic tagging feature.

set-root-structure-element-title.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
set-root-structure-element-title.description: Shows how to assign a document title and set the Title property on the root structure element of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-tagged-pdf-heading-language.title: Create Tagged PDF with Heading and Language
create-tagged-pdf-heading-language.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add a level‑1 heading structure element, assign a language attribute, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a tagged PDF, add a paragraph element, assign a custom tag name, and save the document while handling platform‑specific rendering issues.

add-paragraph-actualtext-to-toci.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI in a Tagged PDF
add-paragraph-actualtext-to-toci.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element in a tagged PDF, add a paragraph beneath it, and set the paragraph's ActualText for accessibility.

add-note-element-to-paragraph.title: Add a Note Element to a Paragraph in a Tagged PDF
add-note-element-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a paragraph and attach a note (footnote/endnote) as its child in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

create-tagged-pdf-with-toc.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
create-tagged-pdf-with-toc.description: Demonstrates how to generate an accessible tagged PDF, set language and title metadata, add a Table of Contents page, create heading and paragraph elements, and link TOC entries to the corresponding sections using Aspose.Pdf.

add-internal-link-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Internal Link to Tagged PDF
add-internal-link-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a LinkElement with role /Link in a tagged PDF, associating it with a LocalHyperlink that points to a specific page, and optionally adding a visible LinkAnnotation for testing.

add-actualtext-to-span-pronunciation.title: Add ActualText to a Span for Pronunciation in Tagged PDF
add-actualtext-to-span-pronunciation.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, creates a Span element, sets visible text and hidden pronunciation via the ActualText property, then saves the updated PDF.

add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.title: Add External Link with Title to Tagged PDF
add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.description: Demonstrates inserting a link element into a PDF's tagged structure, assigning an external URL, and defining its title attribute for accessibility.

propagate-language-attribute-to-tagged-p.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged PDF Elements
propagate-language-attribute-to-tagged-p.description: Shows how to set a language attribute on the root of a tagged PDF and recursively propagate it to every descendant structure element for improved accessibility.

add-actualtext-to-image-structure-elemen.title: Add ActualText to Image Structure Elements for PDF Accessibility
add-actualtext-to-image-structure-elemen.description: The example loads a PDF, accesses its tagged‑content API, and adds alternative text to each image by setting the ActualText attribute on a FigureElement and linking it to the XImage resource, improving accessibility for screen readers.

add-caption-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.title: Add Caption to Figure in Tagged PDF
add-caption-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Figure element in a tagged PDF and attach a Note element as a caption using Aspose.Pdf.

style-table-cells-background-border-padd.title: Style Table Cells with Background Color, Border, and Padding
style-table-cells-background-border-padd.description: Shows how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and apply visual styling to each cell, including background color, border thickness/color, and padding to improve accessibility.

update-tagged-element-language-french.title: Update Language of a Tagged PDF Element to French
update-tagged-element-language-french.description: Shows how to set the default document language and change the language attribute of a specific ParagraphElement in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-document-language-attribute.title: Set Document Language Attribute in Tagged PDF
set-document-language-attribute.description: Demonstrates how to add a language attribute to the structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting the document-wide language and the root structure element.

add-table-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Table to Tagged PDF Structure
add-table-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a 3x4 table within the logical structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API and save the updated document.

nested-table-in-paragraph-tagged-pdf.title: Create Nested Table Inside Paragraph for Tagged PDF
nested-table-in-paragraph-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to build a tagged PDF where a paragraph contains an outer table, which in turn holds a nested inner table, and validates the logical structure hierarchy.

create-tagged-table-header-with-merged-c.title: Create Tagged Table Header with Merged Cells in PDF
create-tagged-table-header-with-merged-c.description: Demonstrates how to add a tagged table header with merged cells, assign the TH role, and set ActualText for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

custom-table-cell-borders-pdf.title: Custom Table Cell Borders in PDF
custom-table-cell-borders-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, adding a table, and applying different border styles to rows and cells based on the row index using Aspose.Pdf.

add-placeholder-textbox-form-field.title: Add Placeholder TextBox Form Field and Tag as /Form Element
add-placeholder-textbox-form-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field with placeholder text, adds it to the document's form, and tags the field with a /Form structure element for accessibility.

replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.title: Replace Note Element in Tagged PDF
replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to locate an existing NoteElement in a tagged PDF, remove it, and insert a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

set-figure-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Figure Title in Tagged PDF
set-figure-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a Figure element in a tagged PDF, assign a concise Title and alternative text, and add it to the structure tree using Aspose.Pdf.

parse-xml-validation-report-summary.title: Parse XML Validation Report and Summarize Errors
parse-xml-validation-report-summary.description: Loads an XML validation report, counts occurrences of each error code, collects distinct messages, and prints a concise summary with sample messages.

tag-table-cells-data-types-validate-pdfa.title: Tag Table Cells with Data Types and Validate PDF/A Compliance
tag-table-cells-data-types-validate-pdfa.description: Demonstrates how to create a visual table, build a corresponding logical‑structure table with custom data‑type tags, and validate the PDF for PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

export-structure-tree-report.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
export-structure-tree-report.description: Shows how to export a PDF's accessibility structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then transform that XML with an XSLT stylesheet to create an HTML report.

create-tagged-form-field.title: Create Tagged Form Field in PDF
create-tagged-form-field.description: Shows how to add a text box form field, register it in the AcroForm, and link it to a /Form structure element for tagged PDF accessibility.

extract-notes-from-tagged-pdf.title: Extract Notes from Tagged PDF to Text File
extract-notes-from-tagged-pdf.description: Loads a tagged PDF, finds all NoteElement objects in the logical structure, concatenates their visible text, and writes the result to a plain‑text file.

modify-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.title: Modify Paragraph ActualText in a Tagged PDF
modify-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.description: Loads a tagged PDF, finds a paragraph whose ActualText matches a given title, updates the text using SetText, and saves the corrected document.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdf-ua.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDF/UA with Auto‑Tagging
batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdf-ua.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, enables Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, converts each document to PDF/UA format, and saves the tagged PDFs to a separate output folder.

create-nested-list-tagged-pdf.title: Create Nested Bullet and Numbered List in a Tagged PDF
create-nested-list-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to build a top‑level bullet list with a nested numbered sub‑list in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API, and validates the structure tree before saving.

set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Paragraph Title in Tagged PDF for Accessibility
set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically assign a title (summary) to a paragraph element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enhancing document accessibility.

set-language-for-all-structure-elements.title: Set Language for All Structure Elements in Tagged PDF
set-language-for-all-structure-elements.description: Shows how to assign a default language to a PDF document and ensure every tagged structure element has an explicit language attribute using Aspose.Pdf.

check-pdf-ua-compliance-and-log-result.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
check-pdf-ua-compliance-and-log-result.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, checks its PDF/UA (accessibility) compliance, outputs the boolean to the console, and writes the result to a log file for further processing.

extract-text-from-tagged-pdf-structure-t.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF Structure Tree
extract-text-from-tagged-pdf-structure-t.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its tagged content, and recursively walk the structure tree to retrieve ActualText or AlternativeText from each element.

export-tagged-pdf-structure-to-json.title: Export Tagged PDF Structure to JSON
export-tagged-pdf-structure-to-json.description: Shows how to read a PDF's tagged structure with Aspose.Pdf, build a hierarchical POCO model, and serialize it to a JSON file while preserving the document hierarchy.

batch-add-missing-tags-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Missing Tags to PDFs
batch-add-missing-tags-to-pdfs.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, enables Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging to add missing accessibility tags, and saves each updated document with a configurable suffix.

add-page-break-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Page Break to Tagged PDF Using Logical Structure
add-page-break-to-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF for improved accessibility using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements and Log Metadata
iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, and recursively walks the logical structure tree, printing each element's title, language, and custom tag.

validate-pdf-ua-compliance-xml-report.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
validate-pdf-ua-compliance-xml-report.description: Demonstrates how to validate a tagged PDF against the PDF/UA standard using Aspose.Pdf, save the compliance results as an XML report, and read the built‑in compliance flag.

batch-pdf-validation-xml-logs-dashboard.title: Batch PDF Validation with XML Logs and Compliance Dashboard
batch-pdf-validation-xml-logs-dashboard.description: Demonstrates how to validate multiple PDF files against PDF/UA, generate XML validation logs, compute a simple compliance metric, and display results in a console dashboard.

list-missing-alt-text-image-ids.title: List Image IDs with Missing Alt Text from Validation XML
list-missing-alt-text-image-ids.description: Loads a validation XML file, filters errors where Alt text is missing, and outputs the distinct image IDs.

export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.description: Loads a tagged PDF, extracts its logical structure tree, converts it into a serializable object, and writes the hierarchy to a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

extract-pdf-link-urls-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Link URLs to CSV
extract-pdf-link-urls-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through link annotations, retrieve their URI actions, and write the page number and URL to a CSV file.

batch-pdfa1b-validation-xml-csv.title: Batch PDF/A-1B Validation with XML Logs and CSV Summary
batch-pdfa1b-validation-xml-csv.description: Demonstrates how to validate multiple PDF files for PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf, generate individual XML validation logs, and compile a summary CSV report.
